name: OpenAI AI Text Classifier
current_state: OpenAI stated that the AI Text Classifier was no longer available due to its low rate of accuracy.
summary: OpenAI's AI Text Classifier was a classifier intended to indicate AI-written text. OpenAI later marked it as no longer available.

events.title: AI Text Classifier marked no longer available
events.description: OpenAI updated the classifier page to state that the AI Text Classifier was no longer available due to its low rate of accuracy.

evidence.title: New AI classifier for indicating AI-written text
